name: Olive Garden Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil until no pink color remains.
2. Crumble the meat with a fork.
3. Stir in the tomatoes, V-8 juice, Prego spaghetti sauce, onion soup mix, and grape jelly.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for 15 to 20 minutes or until the jelly melts and the sauce is hot.
